query:
SELECT 
  oi.id as orderItemId,
  oi.variantId,
  oi.quantity,
  oi.unitPrice,
  pv.variantName,
  pv.variantCode
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
WHERE oi.orderId = 300001;
